docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,490.00 FILED BY RAGUSA, GIUSEPPE (PEPPE) AS TO DEFENDANT BURSTEIN, ELAINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURSTEIN, ELAINE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BURSTEIN, ELAINE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND A REPRESENTATIVE FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAGUSA, GIUSEPPE (PEPPE) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURSTEIN, ELAINE $1,954.00 PRINCIPAL, $119.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,073.50, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS $954.00 TO BE RETURNED FOR PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, AND $1000.00 STATUTORY DAMAGES FOR DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH, NON COMPLIANCE WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR THE $209.00 PREVIOUSLY TENDERED IF THAT PAYMENT HAS BEEN ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
